examples: Hotpot is made from mutton and onion.
Hotpot is made from meat, potatoes and onions.
It is a very delightful experience to eat hotpot in the cold winter.
Ding Chen Chinese Hotpot is one block south of the MIAT office (look for the red sign across from the Art Cinema).
For those who want to hone more traditionally British skills, they also offer a course in typical dishes such as Lancashire hotpot and stargazy pie.
